title.en: After Ye Tian got the primordial dark dragon li...

content.en:
Subsequently.

Ye Tian's Primordial Treasure Rat handed over this drop of Primordial Dark Dragon Liquid to the True Body Replica Body.

"This replica body is cultivated here!"

After Ye Tian got the primordial dark dragon liquid, he began to cultivate here.

Grunt!

After swallowing the primordial dark dragon liquid, Ye Tian began to refine it, which was used to improve his cultivation.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's cultivation was improving, and the improvement speed was far beyond before.

this day.

Ye Tian found another drop of primordial dark dragon liquid.

For him, the Primordial Void is a real treasure land!

The primordial dark dragon liquid is promoted to cultivation, and the primordial dust gold is promoted to the second sequence to the realm of Dao rules.

It can be said that Ye Tian's strength is improving all the time.

After a period of time, Ye Tian found another treasure of one of the Three Treasures of the Primordial Void - the Primordial Realm Flower.

The Primordial Flower is transparent, exuding a rich and extremely time-space atmosphere.

Ye Tian carefully took the Primordial Realm Flower and put it away.

This kind of primordial realm flower is very precious, even if you don't need it, if you take it out and sell it, some elders will buy it.

Time flies.

Ye Tian's harvest was getting more and more, and even before this drop of primordial dark dragon liquid had been refined, another drop of primordial dark dragon liquid was found.

Other than that.

The same goes for primordial dust.

One era after another has passed.

10,000 Solstice Era!

100,000 Solstices!

......

"The Primordial Void doesn't seem to have much Primordial Dark Dragon Liquid, Primordial Dust Gold, and Primordial Realm Flowers!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Because he is not the only one who comes here to look for resources, for an endless long time, one by one legends to the Dao realm come here to look for it, although most of them are not harvested, but occasionally there will be harvest!

So, a lot of resources were found.

Plus, sometimes the patriarchs come in.

This time, he was able to obtain such a number of three treasures, which was already open.

"That's pretty much it, it is estimated that it will take a long time before new resources are born!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian is back.

After he returned, he began to continue his retreat.

He has obtained a lot of primordial dark dragon liquid, primordial dust gold, and primordial realm flowers, but he hasn't used them yet.

Not long after he came back, Ye Tian's cultivation finally broke through from the early stage of the Legend to the Dao Realm to the middle stage of the Legend to the Middle Stage of the Dao Realm with the help of the primordial Dark Dragon Liquid.

If it was given to ordinary legends to the Dao realm, the primordial dragon liquid he consumed would be enough to advance their cultivation to the peak realm of the Legends Dao realm.

Other than that.

Ye Tian's second sequence to the realm of Dao rules has also skyrocketed, and now he has comprehended that the second sequence of supreme Dao rules is sixty into five realms, which is already a terrifying progress.

He seriously suspected that some of the Patriarchs' Second Sequence Dao Rule Realm was not as high as his.

However, his strength is still far from the patriarch.

"Next, we have to trade a large number of dragon scale ancient stones, so let's use the Primordial Realm Flower to trade!"

Ye Tian thought about which veteran to trade with?

"Su clan, Su Yuan elder!"

Ye Tian thought of this elder.

So, he contacted the patriarch and proposed the Primordial Realm Flower.

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian met with Elder Su Yuan.

"Ye Tian, do you have the Primordial Realm Flower in your hand?" asked Elder Su Yuan.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, "I want to trade the Dragon Scale Ancient Stone with the Primordial Realm Flower, Elder Su should have the Dragon Scale Ancient Stone or have a way to obtain the Dragon Scale Ancient Stone, right?"

Su Yuan smiled slightly, "I can naturally easily get the Dragon Scale Ancient Stone, so let's do it, a Primordial Realm Flower can be exchanged for a thousand cubic meters of Dragon Scale Ancient Stone, this is not too much, right?"

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

The deal was reasonable, and he had no reason to refuse.

"Is there no limit to the number?" Ye Tian added.

"Could it be that you still have more than one Primordial Realm Flower?" this time it was Su Yuan's turn to be surprised.

"Yes!" Ye Tianying said.

Su Yuan was silent for a moment, "I only need five Primordial Flowers, and if you have more Primordial Flowers, I don't need them either." "

"Okay, then trade five Primordial Flowers!"

Ye Tian said.

Su Yuan was very surprised, he asked for five primordial realm flowers, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to be able to take them out.

Primordial Realm Flowers, which only exist in the Primordial Void, can only rely on luck to find Primordial Realm Flowers there, even if he goes in to find them, he may not be able to find five Primordial Realm Flowers for an endless long time!

Ye Tian must have found more than five Primordial Realm Flowers, he can only say that it was luck!

He didn't know what to say except luck.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

Su Yuan personally came here with five thousand square dragon scale stones, and Ye Tian also took out five primordial realm flowers.

The two parties completed the transaction.

"Elder Su Yuan, happy cooperation!"

Ye Tiandao.

Subsequently.

Elder Su Yuan left the Winter Night Fortress and returned to the Su Domain.

After returning, Elder Su Yuan was ready to resurrect a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm that was very important to him, Su Luo!

Su Luo Nai was his grandson, who was slain by the Supreme Void Demon long ago.

He couldn't resurrect it, or he would have been wounded or dead.

So, he's been buying primordial flowers.

However, there are quite a few Ninefold Dao Realms that have fallen in the Innate Origin Domain, so the Primordial Realm Flower is not enough at all, and many patriarchs are buying them.

If there were no Primordial Realm Flowers, who would dare to casually resurrect a Ninefold Dao Realm.

Moreover, in the case of having the Primordial Realm Flower, it can only resurrect the ordinary Ninefold Dao Realm, and cannot resurrect the Ninefold Dao Realm that has taken the path of the strongest Dao.

Fortunately, his grandson walked the ordinary path, not the path of the strongest to the road.

"Ancestor, do you really want to resurrect Su Luo?"

Soho is coming.

"Yes!" Su Yuan responded: "You should be about to break through, when you break through, the strength of our Sioux will skyrocket, even if I am hit hard, it will not affect the strength of the Sioux clan!"

"Ancestor, can you wait for me to break through before resurrecting Su Luo?"

Soho asked.

Su Yuan was silent for a while, but still nodded: "Okay!"

So in the following days, Soho was ready to hit the veteran level.

......

Another tens of thousands of solstice era time has passed.

this day.

In the Void region where Su Yu was located, an incomparably terrifying phantom erupted, enveloping the Endless Territory.

The other party seemed to be in the space-time origin of the void domain, and the space-time shackles that bound her shattered one after another, and the terrifying aura permeated the many innate origin domains of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and such a vision naturally shocked all the Supreme Dao realms.

Ye Tian also spied on this scene, and was quite surprised in his heart.

Soon, he knew what was going on.

Su Yu's Soho broke through, breaking through from the Legend to the Dao Realm to the Patriarch level.
